summary: Completed testing of Brand Kit and Email Analytics features. All backend APIs working (11/11 tests pass). Frontend pages load and function correctly with live preview, color pickers, input fields, stats grid, engagement rates, and recent activity.

minor.issue: Returns 520 (Cloudflare error) for invalid ObjectId instead of 400/404

brand_kit_page_loads.description: Brand Kit page loads with header 'Brand Kit', Save button, and back button

brand_kit_live_preview.description: Live preview shows company name, tagline, and email content preview with primary color header

brand_kit_color_pickers.description: Color pickers for Primary (#007AFF), Secondary (#34C759), and Accent (#FFD60A) colors work with preset colors and custom hex input

brand_kit_input_fields.description: Input fields for Logo URL, Company Name, Tagline, and Footer Text are present and functional

brand_kit_social_links.description: Social Links section has inputs for Website, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, LinkedIn

email_analytics_page_loads.description: Email Analytics page loads with header, refresh button, and stats

email_analytics_stats_grid.description: Stats grid shows Emails Sent (1), Delivered (1), Opened (0), Clicked (0)

email_analytics_engagement_rates.description: Engagement Rates section shows Open Rate (0%) and Click Rate (0%) with progress bars

email_analytics_recent_activity.description: Recent Activity shows 'Forest Ward - Test Email from iMos - Sent - Feb 21, 3:06 PM'

email_analytics_time_range.description: Time range selector has 7 Days, 30 Days, 90 Days, All Time buttons. 30 Days is default selected

menu_items_visible.description: Both 'Brand Kit' and 'Email Analytics' menu items visible in More page with correct subtitles

backend_brand_kit_api.description: GET and PUT /api/email/brand-kit/{entity_type}/{entity_id} endpoints work correctly

backend_analytics_api.description: /api/email/analytics/{user_id} returns correct metrics with days parameter support

backend_logs_api.description: /api/email/logs/{user_id} returns email logs with proper structure

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and email log
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand Kit and Email Analytics features fully working. Brand Kit page shows live preview, color pickers (10 preset colors + custom hex), input fields (logo URL, company name, tagline, footer text), and social links (website, facebook, instagram, twitter, linkedin). Email Analytics shows stats grid (Emails Sent, Delivered, Opened, Clicked), engagement rates (Open Rate, Click Rate with progress bars), time range selector (7/30/90 days, All Time), and Recent Activity with sent emails. Backend uses email_logs collection for analytics. One email already exists in system from previous testing.
